name: cktk
description: Software development and UI design workflow skills.
author: Calvin Ku

skills.name: create-tickets
skills.description: Generate development tickets from PRD or feature catalogs, with optional design inputs — files, directories, URLs, PDF, PPTX, or HTML (including Claude Design handoff bundles)

skills.name: implement-ticket
skills.description: Implement a specific ticket with code review, optionally in an isolated worktree

skills.name: review-ticket
skills.description: Review code changes for bugs and ticket alignment

skills.name: update-ticket
skills.description: Update ticket status, cascade dependencies, and refresh INDEX.md

skills.name: commit-ticket
skills.description: Create a single git commit from current changes

skills.name: commit-push-pr
skills.description: Create commit, push branch, and open a pull request

skills.name: create-worktree
skills.description: Create git worktrees for one or more tickets, each on its own branch under .worktrees/NNN-slug

skills.name: merge-worktree
skills.description: Merge ticket worktrees back into their base branch, then remove the worktree and delete the local branch

skills.name: feature-catalog
skills.description: Explore a codebase and produce a user-facing feature catalog

skills.name: cktk-upgrade
skills.description: Pull the latest cktk skills from GitHub

skills.name: design-system-extractor
skills.description: Extract design tokens from UI screenshots into structured JSON

skills.name: design-system-web-applier
skills.description: Generate web theme files from design token JSON

skills.name: design-system-mobile-applier
skills.description: Generate native mobile theme files from design token JSON

skills.name: wcag-accessibility-checker
skills.description: Audit React/Next.js apps for WCAG 2.2 accessibility compliance

skills.name: ux-design
skills.description: Generate UX design specification from a PRD using 6 forced designer passes

skills.name: ux-redesign
skills.description: Audit codebase against UX spec and redesign with 6 forced designer passes

skills.name: cinematic-design-system
skills.description: Generate a cinematic design system bundle (4 Markdown docs + 2 HTML previews) from a director and a specific film via a 4-phase workflow
